## Checklist

✅ Receipt must have a schema reference.
✅ Receipt must have a validator reference.
✅ Receipt must not contain secret values, tokens, API keys, PATs or raw credentials.
✅ Receipt must not rely on issue #31 writes.
✅ Receipt must not self-claim Release PASS.
✅ Release decision must pass `governance/validators/validate_release_decision.py`.
⚠️ Missing external receipt keeps the corresponding gate blocked.
❌ Release PASS is not issued by this checklist.
